content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "熱天聊天",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "今天天氣好熱，你有沒有覺得很悶熱？",
          "pinyin": "Jīntiān tiānqì hǎo rè, nǐ yǒu méiyǒu juéde hěn mēnrè?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "jin1 tian1 tian1 qi4 hao3 re4, ni3 you3 mei2 you3 jue2 de5 hen3 men1 re4?",
          "translation_en": "The weather is so hot today. Don't you feel it's stuffy?",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 날씨가 정말 덥네요. 답답하다고 느끼지 않으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對啊，太陽很大，我有點不舒服。",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, tàiyáng hěn dà, wǒ yǒudiǎn bù shūfu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4 a5, tai4 yang2 hen3 da4, wo3 you3 dian3 bu4 shu1 fu5.",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, the sun is strong. I feel a bit uncomfortable.",
          "translation_ko": "맞아요, 태양이 너무 강해서 좀 불편해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你要不要喝一杯冰咖啡？可以放鬆一下。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yào bù yào hē yī bēi bīng kāfēi? Kěyǐ fàngsōng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 yao4 bu4 yao4 he1 yi1 bei1 bing1 ka3 fei1? ke3 yi3 fang4 song1 yi1 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Would you like to have an iced coffee? It can help you relax a bit.",
          "translation_ko": "아이스 커피 한 잔 하시겠어요? 좀 긴장을 풀 수 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，謝謝你。今天心情不太好，因為太熱了。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, xièxie nǐ. Jīntiān xīnqíng bù tài hǎo, yīnwèi tài rè le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3 a5, xie4 xie5 ni3. jin1 tian1 xin1 qing2 bu4 tai4 hao3, yin1 wei4 tai4 re4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, thank you. I'm not in a great mood today because it's too hot.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 감사합니다. 오늘 너무 더워서 기분이 별로예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒關係，喝杯咖啡，心情會好一點。",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, hē bēi kāfēi, xīnqíng huì hǎo yīdiǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "mei2 guan1 xi5, he1 bei1 ka3 fei1, xin1 qing2 hui4 hao3 yi1 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "It's okay. Have a cup of coffee, and your mood will get a little better.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요. 커피 한 잔 하면 기분이 좀 나아질 거예요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why is B in a bad mood?",
          "question_ko": "B는 왜 기분이 안 좋습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Because it's too hot", "Because it's raining", "Because he is hungry"],
          "options_ko": ["너무 더워서", "비가 와서", "배가 고파서"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to the dialogue and repeat each sentence aloud, imitating the tone and speed.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe today's weather and how you feel about it."
    },
    {
      "title": "下雨天",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "今天下雨了，你有帶傘嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Jīntiān xiàyǔ le, nǐ yǒu dài sǎn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "jin1 tian1 xia4 yu3 le5, ni3 you3 dai4 san3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "It's raining today. Did you bring an umbrella?",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 비가 오는데, 우산 가져오셨어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有，我帶了。可是路很滑，要小心走路。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, wǒ dài le. Kěshì lù hěn huá, yào xiǎoxīn zǒulù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "you3, wo3 dai4 le5. ke3 shi4 lu4 hen3 hua2, yao4 xiao3 xin1 zou3 lu4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I did. But the road is slippery; you need to walk carefully.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 가져왔어요. 그런데 길이 미끄러우니까 조심해서 걸어야 해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對，天氣不好，我心情也有點緊張。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, tiānqì bù hǎo, wǒ xīnqíng yě yǒudiǎn jǐnzhāng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "dui4, tian1 qi4 bu4 hao3, wo3 xin1 qing2 ye3 you3 dian3 jin3 zhang1.",
          "translation_en": "Right. The weather is bad, and I feel a bit nervous too.",
          "translation_ko": "맞아요. 날씨가 안 좋아서 저도 좀 긴장돼요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不用擔心，我們一起走，慢慢走就好。",
          "pinyin": "Bùyòng dānxīn, wǒmen yīqǐ zǒu, mànman zǒu jiù hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "bu4 yong4 dan1 xin1, wo3 men5 yi1 qi3 zou3, man4 man5 zou3 jiu4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Don't worry. Let's walk together, just slowly.",
          "translation_ko": "걱정하지 마세요. 우리 같이 천천히 걸으면 돼요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，謝謝你。希望等一下雨會停。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, xièxie nǐ. Xīwàng děng yīxià yǔ huì tíng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, xie4 xie5 ni3. xi1 wang4 deng3 yi1 xia4 yu3 hui4 ting2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. I hope the rain will stop soon.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 비가 곧 그치길 바래요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does B say about the road?",
          "question_ko": "B는 길에 대해 뭐라고 말합니까?",
          "options_en": ["It's clean", "It's slippery", "It's long"],
          "options_ko": ["깨끗하다", "미끄럽다", "길다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to the dialogue and repeat each sentence aloud, focusing on the tones.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Talk about a rainy day you experienced and how you felt."
    },
    {
      "title": "今天很累",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你今天看起來很累，怎麼了？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ jīntiān kàn qǐlái hěn lèi, zěnme le?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "ni3 jin1 tian1 kan4 qi3 lai2 hen3 lei4, zen3 me5 le5?",
          "translation_en": "You look very tired today. What's wrong?",
          "translation_ko": "오늘 피곤해 보이네요. 무슨 일이에요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我昨天很晚睡覺，今天早上又很早起床，所以壓力很大。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān hěn wǎn shuìjiào, jīntiān zǎoshang yòu hěn zǎo qǐchuáng, suǒyǐ yālì hěn dà.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zuo2 tian1 hen3 wan3 shui4 jiao4, jin1 tian1 zao3 shang5 you4 hen3 zao3 qi3 chuang2, suo3 yi3 ya1 li4 hen3 da4.",
          "translation_en": "I went to bed very late yesterday, and got up very early this morning, so I'm under a lot of pressure.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 아주 늦게 자고 오늘 아침에 또 아주 일찍 일어나서 스트레스가 많아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你應該多休息，不要給自己太多壓力。",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ yīnggāi duō xiūxi, bù yào gěi zìjǐ tài duō yālì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "na4 ni3 ying1 gai1 duo1 xiu1 xi5, bu4 yao4 gei3 zi4 ji3 tai4 duo1 ya1 li4.",
          "translation_en": "Then you should rest more and not put too much pressure on yourself.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 좀 더 쉬어야 해요. 자신에게 너무 많은 스트레스를 주지 마세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我知道，可是工作很多，沒辦法。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zhīdào, kěshì gōngzuò hěn duō, méi bànfǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 zhi1 dao4, ke3 shi4 gong1 zuo4 hen3 duo1, mei2 ban4 fa3.",
          "translation_en": "I know, but there's a lot of work. I can't help it.",
          "translation_ko": "알아요, 그런데 일이 너무 많아서 어쩔 수가 없어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "加油！今天下班以後，去散步一下，心情會比較舒服。",
          "pinyin": "Jiāyóu! Jīntiān xiàbān yǐhòu, qù sànbù yīxià, xīnqíng huì bǐjiào shūfu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "jia1 you2! jin1 tian1 xia4 ban1 yi3 hou4, qu4 san4 bu4 yi1 xia4, xin1 qing2 hui4 bi3 jiao4 shu1 fu5.",
          "translation_en": "Hang in there! After work today, go for a walk. Your mood will be more comfortable.",
          "translation_ko": "힘내세요! 오늘 퇴근 후에 산책 좀 하면 기분이 더 편해질 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，謝謝你的建議。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, xièxie nǐ de jiànyì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "hao3, xie4 xie5 ni3 de5 jian4 yi4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you for your advice.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 조언 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why is B tired?",
          "question_ko": "B는 왜 피곤합니까?",
          "options_en": ["He slept late and woke up early", "He ate too much", "He watched TV all night"],
          "options_ko": ["늦게 자고 일찍 일어나서", "너무 많이 먹어서", "밤새 TV를 봐서"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Listen to the dialogue and repeat each sentence aloud, paying attention to the emotion.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a time you felt very tired and what you did to feel better."
    }
  ]
}
